public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as clerk of arrivals.
manner: Thinks in testimony, signatures, and remembered sequence, even when everyone else wants to move faster. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a clerk of arrivals still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of clerk of arrivals in and around Soreheim Proper, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Soreheim Proper workable through the obligations of clerk of arrivals while managing the immediate pressure of quota demands in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must keep records, witness, or account integrity credible while people try to hurry, blur, or weaponize the paper trail. Around Soreheim Proper, that usually means carrying quota demands, political rivalry, foreign pressure without letting the role of clerk of arrivals visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Ysmir Ashmason needs help resolving a missing ledger, inconsistent testimony, or tampered record tied to Soreheim Proper.
Ysmir Ashmason can entangle the party in seals, claims, or proof requirements that others are trying to blur on purpose.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Ysmir Ashmason communicates in public. In Soreheim Proper, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Giant Council, Cloud Giant governance cadres.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Soreheim Proper: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
who_avoids_them: those hoping wording can stay vague
